input.system:
You are a streaming video agent. You observe 2-second video chunks and maintain memory.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

samples.output: <think>A white bowl filled with chili, featuring red kidney beans and ground meat in a thick sauce, sits on a wooden table. A triangular yellow tortilla chip is partially submerged in the chili on the right side. The scene remains static with no visible movement or changes in lighting throughout the two-second interval.</think><answer></answer>

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>

compressed_segments.text: From 0-2s, a white bowl filled with chili, red kidney beans, and ground meat in thick sauce sits on a wooden table with a yellow tortilla chip. At 2s, the view shifts to a montage featuring spaghetti with meat sauce, shredded cheese, and basil centrally, flanked by a taco shell and the chili bowl. By 4s, the view zooms out to a tiled collage introducing a double-patty hamburger with lettuce, meatballs with parsley, and a rectangular baked lasagna dish. The grid expands into a dense, scrolling mosaic of repeating food images from 6-8s. Between 8-10s, the tiles rearrange, positioning the hamburger lower center and lasagna upper left. Finally, from 10-12s, the camera zooms in to isolate a hard-shell taco with cheese and lettuce on the left and the pan of baked lasagna on the right.

[12-16] A hard-shell taco with a textured yellow corn shell, ground beef, shredded cheese, lettuce, and tomatoes is isolated against a white background in a static close-up. [16-18] The scene cuts to a man with short, spiky grey hair in a white chef's coat standing in a commercial kitchen under a stainless steel hood. [18-20] A close-up shows hands chopping white ingredients on a green cutting board on a stainless steel counter, with metal bowls on a shelf behind. [20-26] The view returns to the man in the chef's coat speaking; his facial expressions shift, and he gestures with his right hand while standing beneath the ventilation hood.

[26-30] A man with spiky grey hair wearing a white chef's coat smiles broadly and speaks in a commercial kitchen, with a stainless steel ventilation hood and orange-tinted windows visible behind him. [30-34] The camera cuts to a static high-angle close-up of a clear glass bowl containing a block of raw pink ground meat. A hand hovers over the bowl, pointing an index finger at the meat near a white label with illegible text on the rim. [34-36] The bowl's contents change to whole white button mushrooms, which reflect overhead light as a hand points down at them. [36-42] The video returns to the chef, who looks down with a slight smile before lifting his head to speak directly to the camera, standing before kitchen shelving and white tiled walls.

[42-44] A close-up shows brown, round meatballs with textured, seared dark crusts and small embedded white chunks frying in bubbling hot fat within a pan. [44-46] The scene cuts back to the chef speaking briefly with eyes closed, then shifts to a close-up of hands using a silver knife to slice white mushrooms on a green cutting board. [46-52] Sliced pieces accumulate in a central pile while whole mushrooms remain grouped on the right; the chef's white coat sleeves are visible as the knife lifts vertically and the right hand gestures near the uncut mushrooms on the preparation surface. [52-58] A hand reaches down to grab and gather the central pile of sliced mushrooms, after which the chef uses the silver knife to chop through the accumulated pieces, holding the pile steady with the left hand while whole mushrooms remain clustered on the right side of the green board.

[58-64] The scene transitions from chopping mushrooms to a medium shot of a man with short spiky grey hair wearing a white chef's coat speaking directly to the camera. He stands in a commercial kitchen with stainless steel ventilation hoods and white tiled walls visible behind him. The view switches to a high-angle close-up of a black frying pan containing a pool of oil on a gas stove grate beside a stainless steel surface. [64-68] Hands release chopped white ingredients into the oiled pan, scattering the diced pieces across the bottom surface to form a central pile. The person wears a white coat and striped apron. [68-74] A hand grips the black handle on the left, slightly tilting the pan before releasing it. The pan remains stationary on the burner next to the counter, with the chopped white mushrooms spread evenly across the cookware's surface. A person wearing a black-and-white striped apron stands nearby, but no hands touch the cookware.

recent_thinks: [74-76] A black frying pan filled with chopped white mushrooms sits stationary on a gas stove burner. The diced ingredients remain spread across the pan's bottom surface. A stainless steel counter is visible to the left, and a person in a striped apron stands nearby, not touching the cookware.

[76-78] The scene cuts to a medium shot of the man with short, spiky grey hair wearing a white chef's coat. He stands in a commercial kitchen with a large stainless steel ventilation hood and a pink brick wall visible in the background, speaking directly towards the viewer with changing facial expressions.

[78-80] The scene cuts from the chef to a high-angle close-up of a black frying pan on a gas stove. Inside, the chopped mushrooms have cooked down significantly, appearing browned and filling the pan's surface densely. A person wearing a black-and-white striped apron stands partially visible in the background near stainless steel shelving.

[80-82] A black frying pan filled with browned, chopped mushrooms sits stationary on a gas stove burner. The diced ingredients cover the pan's bottom surface. Behind the stove, the lower body of a person wearing a black-and-white striped apron stands still near stainless steel shelving units.

queries.question: Describe the sequence of visual events from the initial food display to the chef's preparation action.

answers.text: The video begins with a white bowl of chili, beans, and meat displayed from 0 to 2 seconds. Following this, a hard-shell taco with beef, cheese, and lettuce appears between 12 and 16 seconds. The scene then shifts to a close-up of a smiling chef in a white coat within a commercial kitchen. Finally, the view changes to a glass bowl containing raw ground meat, where a hand points toward the ingredient, marking the start of the preparation sequence.

The video transitions from the initial food displays to a tight close-up of a smiling chef with spiky grey hair in a white coat, set against a commercial kitchen backdrop with stainless steel vents. Subsequently, the scene cuts to a high-angle view of a clear glass bowl containing raw pink ground meat. A hand enters the frame, pointing an index finger directly at the meat's surface near a white label on the rim, indicating the specific ingredient for the upcoming preparation.

Following the initial ingredient showcase, the glass bowl's contents switch from raw ground meat to whole white button mushrooms, with a hand pointing to indicate the fresh fungi. The scene then cuts back to the chef in his white coat under the ventilation hood. He looks downward with a slight smile, appearing to focus on a workspace below the camera's view, signaling a transition to the next stage of culinary activity.

After highlighting the mushrooms, the chef reappears under the ventilation hood, shifting his gaze from the workspace to address the camera directly. He continues speaking with an engaged expression while standing before kitchen shelving and white tiled walls. This sequence marks a transition from ingredient identification to verbal instruction, as the chef actively communicates the next steps in the preparation process within the commercial kitchen setting.

The sequence concludes with a shift to active cooking, showing brown, round meatballs frying in a pan. Bubbling oil surrounds the textured spheres, which feature a seared, dark crust. Small white chunks are visible embedded within the cooking meat as it sizzles in the hot fat, marking the transition from ingredient display to the actual preparation phase.

samples.output: <think>A black frying pan filled with browned, chopped mushrooms sits on a gas burner. The diced ingredients cover the pan's base. A person in a black apron with white vertical stripes stands behind the stove near metal shelving. The shot remains a static high-angle view of the cooking process.</think><answer></answer>

Finally, the view changes to a glass bowl containing raw ground meat, where a hand points toward the ingredient, marking the start of the preparation sequence.

The video transitions from the initial food displays to a tight close-up of a smiling chef with spiky grey hair in a white coat, set against a commercial kitchen backdrop with stainless steel vents. Subsequently, the scene cuts to a high-angle view of a clear glass bowl containing raw pink ground meat. A hand enters the frame, pointing an index finger directly at the meat's surface near a white label on the rim, indicating the specific ingredient for the upcoming preparation.

Following the initial ingredient showcase, the glass bowl's contents switch from raw ground meat to whole white button mushrooms, with a hand pointing to indicate the fresh fungi. The scene then cuts back to the chef in his white coat under the ventilation hood. He looks downward with a slight smile, appearing to focus on a workspace below the camera's view, signaling a transition to the next stage of culinary activity.

After highlighting the mushrooms, the chef reappears under the ventilation hood, shifting his gaze from the workspace to address the camera directly. He continues speaking with an engaged expression while standing before kitchen shelving and white tiled walls. This sequence marks a transition from ingredient identification to verbal instruction, as the chef actively communicates the next steps in the preparation process within the commercial kitchen setting.

The sequence concludes with a shift to active cooking, showing brown, round meatballs frying in a pan. Bubbling oil surrounds the textured spheres, which feature a seared, dark crust. Small white chunks are visible embedded within the cooking meat as it sizzles in the hot fat, marking the transition from ingredient display to the actual preparation phase.

The video progresses from static food displays to active culinary work. After the initial shots of chili and a hard-shell taco, the focus shifts to the chef speaking directly to the camera in a commercial kitchen. The sequence then highlights specific ingredients, showing close-ups of seared meatballs before transitioning to the chef chopping mushrooms on a green board. This action marks the definitive start of the preparation phase, moving beyond mere ingredient presentation to hands-on cooking.

queries.question: What entities are present and what are they doing?

answers.text: A man with short spiky grey hair in a white chef's coat stands in a commercial kitchen beneath a stainless steel ventilation hood. He chops white mushrooms on a green cutting board using a metal knife while speaking. Behind him, stainless steel equipment with visible text labels rests against a white tiled wall. The scene also features close-ups of browned meatballs and seasoned mushrooms cooking in a black frying pan on a gas stove.

Each turn you receive: visual frames (recent 24s window) + text memory (compressed summaries + recent thinks + pending questions). Output exactly ONE action:

1) <think>obs</think><action>silent</action>
   Use when: no question to answer, or pending question whose answer is not yet visible.

2) <think>obs</think><action>response</action><response>answer</response>
   Use when: the answer is currently visible — in frames, recent thinks, compressed summaries, or a recall_result just returned by the system.

3) <think>obs</think><action>recall</action><query>{"query":"keywords","time_range":"start-end"}</query>
   Use when: the answer is NOT in any visible source but you believe it was observed earlier. The system will search past observations and return a <recall_result> in your next input. Write 3-5 discriminative keywords (entity names + attributes), no answer values.

4) <think>obs</think><action>compress</action><summary>{"time_range":[s,e],"text":"..."}</summary>
   Use when: system sends <compress_trigger>. Summarize the specified thinks. Retain ALL entity names, visual attributes, OCR, and state changes. If no range is specified, select the oldest thinks to compress.

Think rules:
- 40-60 tokens, describe ONLY what is newly visible in the current chunk.
- No meta-reasoning, no sound/smell/emotion, no speculation.
- Maintain consistent entity names from memory (e.g., chef_1, pot_1).

compressed_segments.text: From 0-2s, a white bowl filled with chili, red kidney beans, and ground meat in thick sauce sits on a wooden table with a yellow tortilla chip. At 2s, the view shifts to a montage featuring spaghetti with meat sauce, shredded cheese, and basil centrally, flanked by a taco shell and the chili bowl. By 4s, the view zooms out to a tiled collage introducing a double-patty hamburger with lettuce, meatballs with parsley, and a rectangular baked lasagna dish. The grid expands into a dense, scrolling mosaic of repeating food images from 6-8s. Between 8-10s, the tiles rearrange, positioning the hamburger lower center and lasagna upper left. Finally, from 10-12s, the camera zooms in to isolate a hard-shell taco with cheese and lettuce on the left and the pan of baked lasagna on the right.

[12-16] A hard-shell taco with a textured yellow corn shell, ground beef, shredded cheese, lettuce, and tomatoes is isolated against a white background in a static close-up. [16-18] The scene cuts to a man with short, spiky grey hair in a white chef's coat standing in a commercial kitchen under a stainless steel hood. [18-20] A close-up shows hands chopping white ingredients on a green cutting board on a stainless steel counter, with metal bowls on a shelf behind. [20-26] The view returns to the man in the chef's coat speaking; his facial expressions shift, and he gestures with his right hand while standing beneath the ventilation hood.

recent_thinks: [26-28] The camera cuts to a tight close-up of the man with spiky grey hair wearing a white chef's coat. He smiles broadly, revealing his teeth. Behind him, the stainless steel ventilation hood and orange-tinted window panels are visible in the commercial kitchen environment.

By 4s, the view zooms out to a tiled collage introducing a double-patty hamburger with lettuce, meatballs with parsley, and a rectangular baked lasagna dish. The grid expands into a dense, scrolling mosaic of repeating food images from 6-8s. Between 8-10s, the tiles rearrange, positioning the hamburger lower center and lasagna upper left. Finally, from 10-12s, the camera zooms in to isolate a hard-shell taco with cheese and lettuce on the left and the pan of baked lasagna on the right.

[12-16] A hard-shell taco with a textured yellow corn shell, ground beef, shredded cheese, lettuce, and tomatoes is isolated against a white background in a static close-up. [16-18] The scene cuts to a man with short, spiky grey hair in a white chef's coat standing in a commercial kitchen under a stainless steel hood. [18-20] A close-up shows hands chopping white ingredients on a green cutting board on a stainless steel counter, with metal bowls on a shelf behind. [20-26] The view returns to the man in the chef's coat speaking; his facial expressions shift, and he gestures with his right hand while standing beneath the ventilation hood.

[26-30] A man with spiky grey hair wearing a white chef's coat smiles broadly and speaks in a commercial kitchen, with a stainless steel ventilation hood and orange-tinted windows visible behind him. [30-34] The camera cuts to a static high-angle close-up of a clear glass bowl containing a block of raw pink ground meat. A hand hovers over the bowl, pointing an index finger at the meat near a white label with illegible text on the rim. [34-36] The bowl's contents change to whole white button mushrooms, which reflect overhead light as a hand points down at them. [36-42] The video returns to the chef, who looks down with a slight smile before lifting his head to speak directly to the camera, standing before kitchen shelving and white tiled walls.

[42-44] A close-up shows brown, round meatballs with textured, seared dark crusts and small embedded white chunks frying in bubbling hot fat within a pan. [44-46] The scene cuts back to the chef speaking briefly with eyes closed, then shifts to a close-up of hands using a silver knife to slice white mushrooms on a green cutting board. [46-52] Sliced pieces accumulate in a central pile while whole mushrooms remain grouped on the right; the chef's white coat sleeves are visible as the knife lifts vertically and the right hand gestures near the uncut mushrooms on the preparation surface. [52-58] A hand reaches down to grab and gather the central pile of sliced mushrooms, after which the chef uses the silver knife to chop through the accumulated pieces, holding the pile steady with the left hand while whole mushrooms remain clustered on the right side of the green board.

[58-64] The scene transitions from chopping mushrooms to a medium shot of a man with short spiky grey hair wearing a white chef's coat speaking directly to the camera. He stands in a commercial kitchen with stainless steel ventilation hoods and white tiled walls visible behind him. The view switches to a high-angle close-up of a black frying pan containing a pool of oil on a gas stove grate beside a stainless steel surface. [64-68] Hands release chopped white ingredients into the oiled pan, scattering the diced pieces across the bottom surface to form a central pile. The person wears a white coat and striped apron. [68-74] A hand grips the black handle on the left, slightly tilting the pan before releasing it. The pan remains stationary on the burner next to the counter, with the chopped white mushrooms spread evenly across the cookware's surface. A person wearing a black-and-white striped apron stands nearby, but no hands touch the cookware.

recent_thinks: [74-76] A black frying pan filled with chopped white mushrooms sits stationary on a gas stove burner. The diced ingredients remain spread across the pan's bottom surface. A stainless steel counter is visible to the left, and a person in a striped apron stands nearby, not touching the cookware.

queries.question: What color is the chef's coat worn by the man in the kitchen? A. White B. Yellow C. Red D. Green

answers.text: A

samples.output: <think>The scene cuts to a medium shot of the man with short, spiky grey hair wearing a white chef's coat. He stands in a commercial kitchen with a large stainless steel ventilation hood and a pink brick wall visible in the background, speaking directly towards the viewer with changing facial expressions.</think><answer></answer>
